name: creative_short
prompt:
/no_think
Write me a poem about tea based on Ozymandias. Keep it to 14 lines and make it solemn rather than silly.

name: structured_reasoning
prompt: A local language model server became slower after the context window was increased from 8k to 32k. Give a numbered troubleshooting checklist that prioritizes likely causes, measurements to capture, and the order to test fixes.

name: long_context_retrieval
prompt_prefix:
Read the benchmark packet below. Then answer three questions in short labeled sections: 1. Which setting change caused the first major throughput cliff? 2. Which profile was the safest all-around recommendation? 3. Which observation most strongly argued for keeping flash attention enabled? Keep the answer under 220 words.

--- BEGIN PACKET ---
